title: Addis Clip Tight Food Storage Containers 240 ml, 500 ml, 1 Litre and 1.5 Litre Rectangle Pack Of 4 Airtight Containers Bpa Free Easy Locking Lid Clips, Clear Transparent
features: Addis Clip Tight containers with four lockable lid clips for effective airtight long lasting freshness; Stackable, simple & easy to use - Wide range of sizes, styles and uses available - Perfect for all food & liquid, Craft & Hobbies, DIY & other home bits & bobs storage

Helping you save money and time, keeping raw ingredients and leftovers fresher for longer; Perfect reusable food storage solution; helping the planet with a sustainable, no need for single use tin foil or cling film; Just use, wash and use again and again

High quality silicone seal airtight lid; Leak-proof, stackable & airtight fridge, freezer, microwave (remove lid), dishwasher safe (top rack) containers; phthalate and BPA-Free; Clear plastic for excellent storage visibility; Designed to nest for easy storage when not in use

Pack of 4 containers including 240ml, 500ml, 1 litre & 1.5 litre all Rectangular; Each dimensions 240ml - w8.5 x d12.3 x h4.2cm (w3.25" x d5" x h2.75 inches), 500ml - w11 x d15.5 x h5.5cm (w4.25" x d6" x h2.2 inches), 1 litre - w13 x d19 x h6.5cm (w5" x d7.5" x h2.5 inches), 1.5 litre - w15.5 x d22.5 x h7.5cm (w6" x d9" x h3 inches)
Addis Since 1780 a Great British brand 'Made for Life' with Addis quality 5 year promise across the Clip Tight range

specifications_table.Recommended uses for product: ‎For Arts & Crafts, For Christmas Ornaments, For Cosmetics & Make-Up, For Food Storage
specifications_table.Special feature: ‎Air Tight, Dishwasher, Freezer, Fridge, Microwave Safe, Lockable, Phthalate and BPA-Free, Stackable
specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Remove all packaging & labels. Please avoid abrasive cleaners or scourers as this may scratch the plastic and lead to staining. Avoid overheating food with high fat, oil, sugar & high colour base. For microwave use, either don't use with lid locked or use without totally removed, Do NOT use in a conventional oven or grill - it's plastic, Top rack dishwasher safe only for both base & lid, Freezer & fridge safe for best freshness storage.
specifications_table.Specific uses for product: ‎For Food Storage, Craft & Hobbies, DIY & Other Home Storage
